name: Anime Filler Skipper
description: Identifies filler episodes in anime series using data from animefillerlist.com and exposes them as skippable media segments. Requires Jellyfin 10.11+.
overview: Skip anime filler episodes automatically. Uses animefillerlist.com to detect filler/mixed-canon episodes and integrates with Jellyfin's media segment system so you can skip them with one click.
